question: Paul Gilroy's 'Black Atlantic' concept applied to Caribbean literature
options: The sacred twins representing the divine duality at the heart of Caribbean identity
Aesthesis reclaims non-Western ways of experiencing beauty against colonial aesthetics
Caribbean culture is transnational and formed through movement across the Atlantic
An ongoing tradition of Black resistance to racial capitalism
answer: Caribbean culture is transnational and formed through movement across the Atlantic
